base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of town_gaia — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Gaia — late-game town, largest town canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gaia — late-game town, largest town canvas
